SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-20-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA BARDALES--LEGAL SERVICES SUPERVISOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTIEL OVIEDO, FERNANDO S. $2,499.99 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,589.99, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
